title: discussion.opened / discussion.closed event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.8. Produced by epd2_deliberation_service.events.discussion_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_discussion_opened_event (discussion.opened) and build_discussion_closed_event (discussion.closed) - verified by reading events.py, both call the identical payload function. Deliberately excludes moderation_policy_id (see discussion_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot).
